author: @silverpc4611
text: If I buy Smart water. Its only because its cheaper then other bottled water.

author: @sheldonskaggs138
text: I live differently than most, I'm home 2 days and the rest of the time I'm at work. So I don't put the time on the stove or microwave or anything else. When I leave I go by the breaker box and flip everything off except for heater/air conditioner which I have set for a reasonable Temps. That way I save $20 a month, so all those led, clocks, computers and TV that still have a parestic loads are turned off. But it really is $20.

author: @jitone1
text: your thoughts an pollution are flawed as mine are too. But I'll add to our knowledge base: We tend to forget that the rest of the world, such as Guatemala and Malaysia,(lol and North Carolina) lives differently than us. In many places there aren't trash pick up. It the us we have poorly funded trash pick up in the counties.  We could charge corporations that use non recyclable materials to fund dumps, and recyclables to fund recycling, But our corporations are in the pockets of the Politian's. giant corporations making millions or billions of dollars cry if they can't dump in rivers. Cities find contaminated river water cheap so we use it for drinking water. While you are right that the common person needs to be mindful, we need to force our government to be also.
